options.name: -all
options.description: To create net-group connected to design partition for all the buses.

options.name: -bus
options.description: Create net-group connected to different partitions only for the mentioned bus.

options.name: -checkOnly
options.description: Checks and reports all the buses present in the design.

options.name: -considerClone
options.description: Make net-group for clone connected bus

options.name: -dontCommit
options.description: Creates net-groups and store in file instead of creating in DB

options.name: -file
options.description: Specifies the name of the file in which the defined groups are stored.

options.name: -ignoreBusSize
options.description: Ingnore bus of size smaller than equal to size specified.

options.name: -ignoreConnectivity
options.description: To ignore ptn connectivity and create netgroup for whole bus.

options.name: -ignoreMultiPartitionPinNet
options.description: Ignore buses connected to multiple ptn/clones

options.name: -includeMacro
options.description: Make bus-net-group which has connection with macro

options.name: -netGroupOptionsList
options.description: To add attribute to created-net-groups like optimizeOrder/spread etc.

options.name: -overwrite
options.description: Overwrites already created net-group by deleting current netgroup element from earlier association

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Add specified prefix to name of generated net-groups.

options.name: -reverseOrder
options.description: To reverse the bus-bit in the created net-groups.
